title: alnus tinctoria f. hirsutoides
intro: Alnus tinctoria f. hirsutoides, also known as Hairy Green Alder, is a variety of the Alder tree, native to Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Alnus tinctoria f. hirsutoides include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
